Contact

Get in touch

This starter ships with a static contact page. You can keep it simple with email and social links, or later connect it to a form backend.

Email

hello@example.com

For a static site, a plain mailto link is the fastest path to deployment.

Social

GitHubXLinkedInEmail

Built with Astro. Adapt this template for your own portfolio or project showcase.

GitHubXLinkedInEmail
